thesis: MARA is the largest publicly traded Bitcoin miner with 1.7 GW of captive power, ~52,850 BTC treasury (~$3.9B), and an emerging AI infrastructure pivot via Starwood partnership. At $14.22, the stock trades near NAV floor with asymmetric upside to BTC rallies and HPC monetization.

drivers: AI infrastructure pivot monetizes via Starwood partnership
75 EH/s hashrate target achieved with margin expansion

risks: Bitcoin bear market below $65K erodes NAV and mining margins
Global hashrate growth compresses block rewards faster than fleet expansion
AI pivot delayed or fails to secure contracts

base_case.assumptions: Bitcoin stable $80K–$95K; operational execution on hashrate; modest AI infrastructure contribution by 2027

catalysts.event: Q2 2026 Earnings — hashrate progress and AI infra update
Bitcoin Halving — block reward cut to 1.5625 BTC

key_risks: Single-asset concentration: 90%+ value tied to Bitcoin price
Mining margin compression from global hashrate growth
